name: Shawarmania
heroSub: Spicy, cheesy, Lebanese — with a desi twist. Fresh ingredients, bold flavors, unforgettable taste.
positioning: Made with passion, served with love. Lebanese-style shawarma rolled fresh every day in Kalyani & Kanchrapara.
ogDescription: Kalyani's premium shawarma — spicy, cheesy, Lebanese with a desi twist. Lab-tested fresh ingredients. Two outlets: Kalyani Central Park & Kanchrapara. Order on Swiggy & Zomato.
